nasb.text: But when Jesus heard this, He answered him, “Do not be afraid any longer; only believe, and she will be made well.”

esv.text: But Jesus on hearing this answered him, “Do not fear; only believe, and she will be well.”

cnv.text: 耶穌聽見就對他說：“不要怕，只要信，她必得痊愈。”

ccb.text: 耶稣听见，就对雅鲁说：“不要怕，只要信。你的女儿一定会好的！”

csbs.text: 耶稣听了，就对睚鲁说：“不要怕，只要信！她就会得救治。”
